Name: 8mm Stabilisation
Code:
# 8mm Stabilisation (videoFred v256.1.01)
stab_mx = _MatrixAuto(c)
stab_yuv = EnsureColorspaceSafe(c, "YV12", matrix=stab_mx)
stab_ref = stab_yuv.Crop({est_left},{est_top},-{est_right},-{est_bottom},align=true)
vectors = stab_ref.MSuper(pel=1).MAnalyse(isb=false, blksize=32, overlap=16, search=2)
mdata = MDepan(stab_ref, vectors, rot=false, zoom=false, error={error})
stab_yuv = DePanStabilize(stab_yuv, data=mdata, cutoff={cutoff}, damping={damping}, dxmax=(Width(stab_yuv)/100)*{maxstabH}, dymax=(Height(stab_yuv)/100)*{maxstabV}, zoommax=0, rotmax=0, method=0, mirror={mirror}, info=false)
c = stab_yuv.Crop({crop_left},{crop_top},-{crop_right},-{crop_bottom},align=true).Prefetch(threads)

Controls.Description: Max horizontal stabilization range (% of width). Higher = corrects larger shaking
Max vertical stabilization range (% of height). Higher = corrects larger shaking
Motion estimation error threshold. Lower = stricter matching, less false corrections
Border fill method. 0=black borders, 1=mirror edges (hides stabilization crop)
High-pass cutoff frequency. Lower = removes slow drift, higher = only fast jitter
Damping of stabilization. Higher = smoother but slower response to real camera moves
Estimation zone: pixels to ignore from left (exclude film sprocket holes)
Estimation zone: pixels to ignore from top
Estimation zone: pixels to ignore from right
Estimation zone: pixels to ignore from bottom
Final crop left: remove black borders after stabilization
Final crop top: remove black borders after stabilization
Final crop right: remove black borders after stabilization
Final crop bottom: remove black borders after stabilization
